name: followup-sequence
description: Write a 3-email follow-up sequence for prospects who have gone silent, using different angles to re-engage without being pushy or annoying.
input_description: Context of original outreach (what was offered, to whom), time elapsed since last contact, any response or signal received, and desired outcome (call booked, proposal reviewed, etc.).
output_description: Three follow-up emails with subject lines, each using a distinct angle: Email 1 (gentle nudge + value add), Email 2 (new angle or social proof), Email 3 (graceful breakup with future door open).
